title: Amira and the Missing Moon
synopsis: When little Amira notices the moon is missing from the night sky, she feels worried and scared. With her brave heart and the help of friendly neighbors, she discovers that sometimes things that seem lost are just hiding behind the clouds, teaching her that being scared is okay and asking for help makes us brave.

pages.text: Amira loved looking at the moon before bedtime. Every night, she would wave from her bedroom window and whisper 'goodnight, moon.' But tonight was different. Tonight, the moon was gone! Amira felt worried and a little scared.

illustration.description: A young girl with warm brown skin and curly black hair in purple pajamas stands at a bedroom window, looking up at a dark night sky with no moon visible. Her expression shows concern and worry. The room is softly lit with a bedside lamp, and there are colorful stuffed animals on her bed. The window frame is painted bright yellow, and the night sky is deep blue with twinkling stars.
illustration.alt: Amira looking worried at her bedroom window, searching for the missing moon

pages.text: Amira ran to find Mama. 'Mama! Mama! The moon is missing!' she cried. Mama was in the kitchen with Papa, who was making warm milk with honey. They both looked surprised. 'Missing?' asked Papa, his kind eyes twinkling. 'That sounds like a mystery!'

illustration.description: A cozy kitchen scene with Amira running toward her parents - Mama has long black hair in a braid and wears a green sweater, Papa has a beard and wears a blue shirt. Papa holds a mug of warm milk while Mama kneels down to Amira's level. The kitchen has warm yellow walls, colorful tiles, and a window showing the dark sky. Everyone's faces show caring concern mixed with gentle amusement.
illustration.alt: Amira telling her parents about the missing moon in their warm, colorful kitchen

pages.text: 'We should look for the moon together,' said Mama gently. 'Sometimes when we're scared, it helps to have friends help us.' Amira felt a little braver already. She held Papa's warm hand and Mama's soft hand, and they went outside to search.

illustration.description: The family of three walks hand-in-hand toward their front door. Amira is in the middle, holding both parents' hands, wearing her purple pajamas and fuzzy slippers. Her expression has changed from worried to more hopeful and brave. The hallway has warm orange walls with family photos, and light spills from the open door showing the night outside.
illustration.alt: Amira holding her parents' hands, feeling braver as they prepare to search for the moon

pages.text: Outside, they met their neighbor Mrs. Chen, who was watering her garden. 'Hello!' she called in her cheerful voice. 'What brings you out so late?' When Amira explained about the missing moon, Mrs. Chen smiled wisely. 'Ah! I think I might know where it is.'

illustration.description: An elderly Asian woman with gray hair in a colorful cardigan tends to her garden with a watering can. She smiles warmly at the family. The garden is full of bright flowers - red roses, yellow sunflowers, and purple lavender. Garden lights create a magical, safe feeling in the darkness. Mrs. Chen's expression is knowing and kind.
illustration.alt: Mrs. Chen in her beautiful nighttime garden, smiling as she meets the searching family

pages.text: Mrs. Chen pointed up at the sky. 'Look very carefully behind that big, fluffy cloud,' she whispered. Amira looked up and gasped with joy! There was the moon, playing peek-a-boo behind the cloud! 'It was hiding!' Amira laughed, feeling so happy and relieved.

illustration.description: Everyone looks up at the night sky where a full, bright yellow moon peeks out from behind a large, fluffy white cloud. Amira's face is lit up with pure joy and wonder, her arms stretched up toward the sky. The adults all smile warmly. Stars twinkle around the cloud, and the moon's gentle light bathes everyone in a soft, magical glow.
illustration.alt: The moon appearing from behind clouds as Amira and the adults look up in wonder and joy

pages.text: 'Sometimes things aren't really lost,' said Papa, giving Amira a cozy hug. 'And being brave means asking for help when we're scared.' Amira waved goodnight to the moon, thanked Mrs. Chen, and felt proud of herself. Back in bed, she felt safe and happy, ready for sweet dreams.

illustration.description: Back in Amira's bedroom, she's tucked into bed with a bright red blanket, waving at the moon now visible through her window. Papa sits on the bed's edge, and Mama stands nearby. The room glows softly with moonlight streaming in. Amira's expression is peaceful and content, with a big smile. Her stuffed animals are arranged around her, and the room feels warm and secure.
illustration.alt: Amira contentedly waving goodnight to the moon from her cozy bed, surrounded by loving parents

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Amira feel when she couldn't see the moon?
questions.explanation: Amira felt worried and scared when she noticed the moon was missing from the sky.

questions.question: Who helped Amira find the moon?
questions.explanation: Mrs. Chen helped by showing Amira where to look, and her parents supported her throughout the search.

questions.question: Where was the moon hiding?
questions.explanation: The moon was hiding behind a big, fluffy cloud, playing peek-a-boo.

questions.question: How did Amira feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Amira felt happy that she found the moon and proud that she was brave enough to ask for help.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words - Page 2
